arts.sum: Real Madrid meet Manchester City in the second leg of their Champions League play-off tie tonight. The Spaniards hold a one-goal advantage from the first encounter, following a dramatic late win at the Etihad. arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Manchester City, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League ’s Round of 32. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Rudiger, Asencio, Mendy, Tchouameni, Ceballos, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Preview: Can Man City come from behind to beat Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Football writer Ben Bloom analyses the key details as Manchester City travel to Real Madrid for the second leg of their UEFA Champions League playoff tie. For the fourth successive season, either Manchester City or Real Madrid will end the other’s UEFA Champions League campaign when the two sides meet on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Man City star arrives at team hotel less than 24 hours before crucial Real Madrid clash - as Pep Guardiola's side battle to stay in the Champions League
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola 's side are facing an unthinkable second-half of the season without European football after stuttering form in their league phase of the top-flight competition.

arts.ttl: Manchester City XI vs Real Madrid – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City make the trip to Real Madrid looking to turn around their Champions League play-off tie. A dramatic 3-2 defeat at the Etihad means Pep Guardiola’s team trail heading into the return. arts.ttl: Real Madrid desperate to avoid unwanted Champions League first against Manchester City
arts.sum: It would be the first time in 33 years since the Champions League was rebranded, ahead of the 1992/23 season, that Madrid have qualified for the tournament and not reached the round of 16 . As the most successful club in the history of the Champions League, Real Madrid would not have anticipated failing to qualify directly for the round of 16 of the ‘new’ UCL.

arts.ttl: Why is Jude Bellingham facing such a long suspension after red card?
arts.sum: Spanish football reporter Manuel Sanchez joins the Monday Night Club to discuss Jude Bellingham's red card and possible lengthy ban for using foul language.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend breaks ranks to give honest opinion on Rodri winning Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri beat Real Madrid's Vinicius Junior to win the Ballon d'Or in 2024, causing plenty of arguments as the players' respective clubs face off in Europe
